calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Continued To Aug-11-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Jun-25-2026 Continued To Jul-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Virginia Dyal's Motion to Transfer is continued to July 13, 2026.

Defendant Virginia Dyal's objection to Plaintiff John E. Cowan's late-filed opposition is overruled. Defendant is granted leave to file a substantive reply to the opposition by July 6, 2026.

The court notes that it does not have a courtesy copy of Plaintiff's late-filed opposition and the rules require that it be provided. Plaintiff must forthwith deliver a courtesy copy to the department with a cover letter noting the new hearing date.

Moving Defendant must prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of this tentative ruling and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org by 8:30 am on 6/25/2026.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2026 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-30-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Continued To May-20-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
